creator: wolfgang.meyer@hob.de
text: Configurations for which I faced the same failure for net/samba43 and net/samba44 as described in the bug report now build the latest version of net/samba44 (4.4.12) from the ports without problems. Had to delete the old installation of net/samba42 beforehand to avoid another collision in the build. The newest ports version of net/samba43 have not been tested for building.
